Description: REQ-02 does not define what constitutes a valid invoice. Without explicit validation rules, dev and QA will make inconsistent assumptions leading to production defects.
Mitigation Strategy: Define explicit validation rules (mandatory fields, format, amount constraints) before sprint begins.

Description: If two AP reviewers open the same invoice simultaneously, a last-write-wins race condition could silently overwrite one reviewer's action.
Mitigation Strategy: Implement optimistic or pessimistic locking on the invoice approval action. Define strategy with Tech Lead.

Description: REQ-04 does not address what happens when the downstream payment system is unavailable. Approved invoices could be silently lost.
Mitigation Strategy: Define fallback strategy: queue + retry, admin alert, hold state. Document in integration spec.

Description: No requirement explicitly specifies row-level data isolation. Absence is a data privacy and compliance risk.
Mitigation Strategy: Add explicit row-level security requirement to REQ-07. QA to include cross-vendor IDOR test cases.

Description: Financial systems are subject to audit. No requirement mentions immutable audit logs. Could be a compliance gap.
Mitigation Strategy: Add audit trail as a non-functional requirement. Define which actions are logged and retention period.

Description: Requirements describe submission and approval but not cancellation, dispute, or amendment workflows.
Mitigation Strategy: Clarify full invoice lifecycle states and transitions. Add to requirements before test design.

Description: "Monthly" is not defined — calendar month, rolling 30 days, or financial month. Will cause discrepancies.
Mitigation Strategy: Define "monthly" scope explicitly. Determine if ad-hoc reports are also needed.
